definitions: 出现；到来（尤指重要事物、时代或技术的出现）

examples.text: every few years as the soil became depleted. It was only with the advent of techniques like irrigation and soil tilling about 5,000 years ago
examples.explanation: with the advent of ... 表示“随着……的出现/到来”。句中 it was only with the advent of techniques like irrigation and soil tilling ... 的意思是：直到像灌溉和翻土这样的技术出现之后，情况才发生改变。这里 advent 强调某种重要技术的出现。

source.text: 城市化与未来的城市 - 万斯·凯特
